name: Generate Prototype ComfyUI SD15 Artifact Webhook

parameters.jsCode:
const request = $('Prepare Generation').first().json;
const response = $input.first().json;
const body = response.body ?? {};
const nodeErrors = body?.node_errors?.['3']?.errors ?? [];
const errorDetails = nodeErrors.length > 0 ? nodeErrors : (body?.error?.details ?? null);

return [{
  json: {
    queued: response.statusCode >= 200 && response.statusCode < 300,
    queueAttempted: true,
    statusCode: response.statusCode ?? null,
    promptId: body?.prompt_id ?? null,
    queueNumber: body?.number ?? null,
    comfyui_base_url: request.comfyui_base_url,
    minio_public_base_url: request.minio_public_base_url,
    requestedCheckpoint: request.requestedCheckpoint,
    availableCheckpoints: request.availableCheckpoints,
    checkpointCount: request.checkpointCount,
    prompt: request.prompt,
    negativePrompt: request.negativePrompt,
    width: request.width,
    height: request.height,
    steps: request.steps,
    cfg: request.cfg,
    samplerName: request.samplerName,
    scheduler: request.scheduler,
    clientId: request.clientId,
    bucket_name: request.bucket_name,
    folder_key: request.folder_key,
    artifact_file_name: request.artifact_file_name,
    object_key: request.object_key,
    output_dir: request.output_dir,
    output_path: request.output_path,
    poll_delay_seconds: request.poll_delay_seconds,
    max_poll_attempts: request.max_poll_attempts,
    errorType: response.statusCode >= 200 && response.statusCode < 300 ? null : (body?.error?.type ?? 'queue_error'),
    errorMessage: response.statusCode >= 200 && response.statusCode < 300 ? null : (body?.error?.message ?? response.statusMessage ?? 'Queue request failed'),
    errorDetails,
    rawResponse: body,
    comfyPayload: request.comfyPayload
  }
}];

assignments.name: output
assignments.value: ={{ `Generated prototype ComfyUI SD1.5 artifact: s3://${$('Parse Download Result').item.json.bucket_name}/${$('Parse Download Result').item.json.object_key}` }}

assignments.name: imageUrl
assignments.value: ={{ $('Parse Download Result').item.json.minio_public_base_url + '/' + $('Parse Download Result').item.json.bucket_name + '/' + $('Parse Download Result').item.json.object_key }}

assignments.name: imageMarkdown
assignments.value: ={{ '![generated image](' + $('Parse Download Result').item.json.minio_public_base_url + '/' + $('Parse Download Result').item.json.bucket_name + '/' + $('Parse Download Result').item.json.object_key + ')' }}
